title: Hornet Removal in Kew Gardens, Queens | $350–$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Kew Gardens, Queens. Safe, effective nest elimination for $350–$550. Licensed exterminators serving Kew Gardens residents. Call now!
intro: Dealing with aggressive hornets in Kew Gardens? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services to protect your home and family from dangerous stings. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests from properties throughout this beautiful Queens neighborhood, ensuring your peace of mind.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Kew Gardens residents, we understand the unique pest challenges facing this tree-lined community. Our licensed exterminators use safe, EPA-approved methods to remove hornet nests quickly and prevent future infestations, all backed by our satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Kew Gardens' stunning Tudor and colonial homes, proximity to Forest Park, and mature tree canopy create ideal nesting conditions for hornets, especially during spring and summer months. From the historic apartment buildings near Lefferts Boulevard to single-family homes near the Queens Borough Hall area, we've successfully protected countless Kew Gardens properties from hornet infestations.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Kew Gardens?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal service throughout Kew Gardens. Most nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on nest size and location. We prioritize emergency calls involving nests near entryways or high-traffic areas.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350–$550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our pricing includes complete inspection, safe nest removal, treatment of the surrounding area to prevent re-nesting, and disposal of the nest. The final cost depends on nest size, location accessibility (ground level vs. high elevation), and severity of infestation. We provide free estimates before beginning work.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Kew Gardens during certain seasons?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornet activity peaks in Kew Gardens from late spring through early fall (May to October). The area's abundant trees and gardens provide ideal nesting sites. We recommend early detection and removal in spring when nests are smaller and colonies are less aggressive.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for children and pets in my Kew Gardens home?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols to protect your family and pets. Our technicians wear protective gear and establish safety perimeters during removal. We advise keeping children and pets indoors during the treatment, and the area is typically safe within 2-4 hours after completion.
